install.welcome.title: Citeck Platform Setup
install.welcome.subtitle: This wizard will configure Citeck on this server.
install.welcome.canChange: You can change settings later by editing the config files or running: citeck install
install.hostname.label: Server hostname or IP
install.hostname.hint: How you will access the platform in a browser
install.hostname.localOnly: Note: Web UI will be local only
install.tls.label: Connection security
install.tls.leTrusted: HTTPS with trusted certificate — Let's Encrypt (recommended)
install.tls.noInternet: No internet access — using auto-generated certificate
install.tls.leChecking: Checking if Let's Encrypt will work for {host}...
install.tls.leFallback: Falling back to auto-generated certificate (HTTPS will still work)
install.tls.leAvailable: Let's Encrypt is available! Using trusted certificate.
install.port.hint: Port for accessing the platform in a browser
install.port.inUse: Warning: port {port} is already in use
install.auth.label: Authentication
install.auth.users.label: Users
install.release.label: Release
install.release.notFoundHelp:
For online install, check your internet connection and retry.
For offline install, use: citeck install --workspace <path-to-workspace.zip>
install.release.noVersions: No releases available in this source
install.cert.mgmtUiHint: (import into browser for remote access to management panel on port 7088)
install.systemd.label: Install as system service?
install.systemd.hint: Citeck will start automatically on boot. Config: /etc/systemd/system/citeck.service
install.systemd.notRoot: Not running as root. To install the systemd service, run:
install.start.label: Start Citeck now?
install.ready.title: Citeck is ready!
install.ready.certWarning:
Note: your browser will show a security warning
because the certificate is auto-generated.
Click "Advanced" -> "Proceed" to continue.
